title: fix: change polli trigger word to !polli
author: Itachi-1824
pr_body_excerpt:
- Trigger word for the Polli assistant is now `!polli` instead of `polli`
- Updated the workflow gate, whitelist regex, and trigger_phrase
- Updated TRIAGE.md docs to match

gist.headline: Polli Gets a Proper Doorbell
gist.blurb: Polli now knows when she is being called, rather than politely investigating every mention of her name. Add `!polli` and the hive assistant is on it.
gist.summary: Changed the repository Polli assistant trigger from `polli` to `!polli`, updating its workflow gate, whitelist regex, trigger phrase, and triage documentation.
gist.impact: GitHub contributors can explicitly summon the assistant with `!polli`, making issue and PR conversations less likely to trigger it accidentally.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a cozy repository helper standing beside a tiny garden-shed help desk with a clearly labeled `!polli` brass bell. A glowing retro terminal and a few code-plants show that the new exclamation-mark call signal opens the workflow gate, while Polli warmly responds to the intentional ping.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute pixel art bee mascot Polli wearing tiny librarian glasses beside a garden-shed GitHub help desk, happily pressing a small brass bell labeled `!polli` while a retro terminal workflow gate glows open among code-plants and flowers. Polli has a yellow body with dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blush, a small happy smile, and rounded light blue translucent wings; use a prominent lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background with warm lighting, subtle CRT glow, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
